div1.entryFree: Powder, vb. to salt: if thou embowel me to-day, I'll give you leave to p. me and eat me too, H4A V, 4, 112. Applied to the customary cure of the lues venerea by sweating in a heated tub: ever your fresh whore and your --ed bawd, Meas. III, 2, 62. from the --ing tub of infamy fetch forth the lazar kite of Cressid's kind, H5 II, 1, 79.
